tool_input.command:
cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && python3 -c "
import json, sys

files = [
    'processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-getting-started-create.json',
    'processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-architecture.json',
    'processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-application-design.json',
    'component/handlers/handlers-body-convert-handler.json',
    'component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json',
    'component/handlers/handlers-jaxrs-bean-validation-handler.json',
    'processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-resource-signature.json',
    'component/adapters/adapters-jaxrs-adaptor.json',
]

for f in files:
    try:
        data = json.load(open(f))
        sections = data.get('sections', [])
        print(f'=== {f} ===')
        for s in sections:
            title = s.get('title','(no title)')[:60]
            print(f'  {s[\"id\"]}: {title}')
        print()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'ERROR {f}: {e}')
"
tool_input.description: Check section IDs in relevant knowledge files

tool_input.command:
cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && for f in \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-getting-started-create.json" \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-architecture.json" \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-application-design.json" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-body-convert-handler.json" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-jaxrs-bean-validation-handler.json" \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-resource-signature.json" \
  "component/adapters/adapters-jaxrs-adaptor.json"; do \
  echo "=== $f ==="; \
  grep -o '"id":"s[0-9]*","title":"[^"]*"' "$f" | head -20; \
  echo; \
done
tool_input.description: List section IDs and titles from relevant knowledge files
